$comment: Manual recurring events for LBI venues whose recurring schedule isn't published on a scrapeable calendar. Each entry materializes the next N occurrences (default 12) starting from today, skipping anything past endDate. Add entries here when a venue lists a 'every Thursday' style series only on their website body text.

events.title: Thunder Thursday
events.description: Drink-special night with DJ on the beach + inside the club. $1 Coors Lights, $2 Miller Lites, $3 Blue Moons, $4 White Claws, $1 kamikaze & jello shots. Runs from 10pm to 2am.
events.address: 10 South Atlantic Ave, Beach Haven, NJ 08008
